summary: Tested reorganized More page with collapsible sections. All 9 test cases passed. The More page was completely redesigned with 8 collapsible sections using LayoutAnimation, consolidating 35+ menu items into organized categories.

minor.issue: 404 error when refreshing user data on My Account page (intermittent)

critical_code_review_comments: Collapsible sections implemented correctly using LayoutAnimation
Essentials section correctly expanded by default as specified
Administration section correctly shows for super_admin user with 10 admin items
data-testid attributes are defined in code but may not render in React Native Web DOM (known limitation)
context_for_next_testing_agent: More page has been reorganized with collapsible sections. 8 sections: Administration (super_admin only), Essentials, Communication, Templates & Branding, Performance, Contacts & Leads, Profile & AI, Settings. Essentials is expanded by default. All section collapse/expand animations work. All navigation links tested and working.
